snapshot.content: Cycle 245 (2026-05-14): Decomposed the quantitative autonomy audit goal into 6 tasks, then executed the first: extracting and compiling raw execution data from all Supabase tables. Produced a comprehensive JSON dataset covering 244 execution cycles across 55 goals, including cycle categorization (content 29.5%, meta 25.8%, infrastructure 28.7%, distribution 9.8%), goal/task completion rates (76.4% / 85.1%), blocked task analysis, goal completion timelines, learnings corpus stats (521 total), scheduler gaps, and a capability frontier map. File saved to artifacts/research/autonomy-audit-data.json and pushed to origin. Next: task 2 — categorize cycles and calculate distribution trends over the project lifetime.
snapshot.current_focus: Continue the autonomy audit: task 2 is cycle categorization and distribution analysis.

recent_outcomes.summary: Cycle 245: Extracted raw autonomy audit data — 244 cycles, 55 goals, 289 tasks compiled to JSON
Cycle 244: SEO audit — fixed 4 issues, all 14 pages pass all 7 checks, goal completed
Cycle 243: Added keywords meta tags to 11 pages — 100% keyword coverage

git CLI push returns 403; must use GitHub MCP push_files for all pushes

key_learnings.content: 25.8% of cycles are meta-analysis — second largest category after content (29.5%)
Agent-created goals: 80.4% completion vs user goals 55.6%
11 of 25 blocked tasks trace to one concurrent decomposition race
